title: CrashItems
description: Custom Items. CrashItems allows you to fully customize your items through an intuitive panel and advanced, easy-to-use scripting!
body:
This is an addon for [CrashPanel | CrashCore](https://modrinth.com/plugin/crashpanel).

CrashItems allows you to create custom items, guis, armors and emotes. You can use custom textures or models easily with the intuitive panel. Thanks to the Script Editor you can program your items in endless different ways. CrashCore is required.

### Features:
- Custom Items
- Custom Guis
- Custom Emotes
- Custom Armors
- Script Editor
### Commands:
- /crashitem [id or name] [amount] = gives custom items
### Permissions:
- crashitems.command.crashitem = Permission to give custom items
### Modules on CrashPanel:
- Custom Items List
- Item Information
- Item Properties
- Item Recipe
- Item Script
- Item Custom Model
- Custom Guis List
- Gui Information
- Custom Emotes List
- Emote Information
- Custom Vanilla Items List
- Vanilla Item Information
- Vanilla Item Recipe

### Transparency Matters
- The marketplace contains material published by any user. Each material is checked by the team before being public.
- Simple registration is required to use the panel.
- More information on the [CrashPanel | CrashCore](https://modrinth.com/plugin/crashpanel) page.

### Documents:
- [Terms and Conditions of CrashPlugin](https://crashplugin.com/terms#english)
- [Privacy Policy](https://crashplugin.com/privacy#english)
